# Arbitus

> The security proxy for AI agents and MCP servers

## About

This file provides a structured overview of the documentation and content available on this site,
optimized for consumption by Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI assistants.

## Pages

- [/](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz)
- [Try](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/try)

## Documentation

### docs

- [Architecture](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/architecture)
  Middleware pipeline, trait-based design, and encoding-aware filtering.
- [Audit](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/audit)
  Audit backends, CloudEvents, OpenLineage, and the audit CLI.
- [Configuration](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/configuration)
  Full YAML reference for Arbitus gateway configuration.
- [Deployment](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/deployment)
  Docker, Helm, HTTPS, mTLS, stdio mode, and graceful shutdown.
- [Getting Started](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/getting-started)
  Install Arbitus and secure your MCP servers in under 5 minutes.
- [Arbitus Documentation](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/index)
  Arbitus documentation — the security proxy for AI agents and MCP servers.
- [Observability](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/observability)
  Prometheus metrics, OpenTelemetry, dashboard, health checks, and circuit breaker.
- [Security](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/security)
  Encoding-aware filtering, prompt injection detection, OPA/Rego policies, and supply-chain verification.
- [Usage](https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs/docs/usage)
  HTTP mode, HITL approvals, shadow mode, federation, and more.

To get the complete documentation in a single file, request:
https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/llms-full.txt

https://arbitus-gateway.xyz/docs.json
